title: MIN 588 (M+F) Amendment 4 Codes of practice for controlling risks due to noise and vibration on ships
body: "Notice to all shipowners, large yacht owners, fishing vessel owners, fleet managers, safety managers, training managers, masters, yacht masters, skippers, training colleges and training organisations.  This notice replaces MIN 588 (M+F) amendment 3 and will expire 7th October 2026. "
